message:
refactor(config): deprecate git-portable/belt-and-suspenders sync modes (gt-vemg9q.5)

GetSyncMode() now always returns dolt-native. The git-portable and
belt-and-suspenders constants are kept (deprecated) for config migration
but removed from valid mode lists. Simplifies doctor KV check and
config validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rig: gastown
Role: crew
